members.name: defaultValue
members.description: The default value of the input

members.name: modelValue
members.description: The controlled value of the input

members.name: min
members.description: The smallest value allowed for the input.

members.name: max
members.description: The largest value allowed for the input.

members.name: step
members.description: The amount that the input value changes with each increment or decrement "tick".

members.name: stepSnapping
members.description: When `false`, prevents the value from snapping to the nearest increment of the step value

members.name: focusOnChange
members.description: When `true`, the input will be focused when the value changes.

members.name: formatOptions
members.description:
Formatting options for the value displayed in the number field. This also affects what characters are allowed to be
typed by the user.

members.name: locale
members.description: The locale to use for formatting dates

members.name: disableWheelChange
members.description: When `true`, prevents the value from changing on wheel scroll.

members.name: invertWheelChange
members.description: When `true`, inverts the direction of the wheel change.

members.description: Properties forwarded to the root element.

members.name: name
members.description: The name of the field. Submitted with its owning form as part of a name/value pair.

members.name: required
members.description: When `true`, indicates that the user must set the value before the owning form can be submitted.

members.description: Id of the input element

members.name: autofocus
members.description: When `true`, the input is auto-focused.
